text:
2010/12/28 Stanislav Sedov <stas@freebsd.org>:
> On Dec 27, 2010, at 12:46 AM, wen heping <wenheping@gmail.com> wrote:

>> 2010/12/27 Stanislav Sedov <stas@freebsd.org>:
>>> What is the reason for update?
>>> Did you performed regression testing to verify that everything works as
>>> expected and there're no regressions?
>>
>> It seems "make validator" is not very good =C2=A0 :(
>>
> It's known not to pass completely, the question is how bad is it compared=
 to
> the previous version. =C2=A0There's no reason to update it unless it fixe=
s something
> important. =C2=A0Guess what people will say and what they will switch to =
if their
> web application will stop working after the next update being perfectly v=
alid.
> That's why for security update we usually backport patches instead of bli=
ndly
> bumping up the version.

Then I shall close the PR.

But I do not think the update is blindly since some other open soucrce
distribution update their ruby18 to 330 patchlevel and I hear no broken
because of the update.

wen
